strategy_decisions.rationale: This ETH value-recovery scale-in branch traded, but it still failed honestly with PF 0.62, negative return, and only 4 trades. The partial improvement in transition bars does not rescue the fact that the tested edge is weak and too thin to trust in a fully choppy brief.
This BTC asymmetric range-persistence branch produced 0 trades on valid data. Even with cleaner role separation, the entry grammar still overconstrained participation and did not engage at all.

This TAO retest-hold derisk branch also produced 0 trades on valid data. Time-based de-risking never had a chance to matter because the retest-hold continuation logic remained structurally too sparse for the lane.
